summary: The diff implements all four requirements (REQ-13, REQ-14, REQ-15, REQ-16) with good coverage. The meta tags, Open Graph tags, JSON-LD structured data, ServiceAreas component, Hero/About/Contact text enrichment are all present. One minor concern is that the JSON-LD areaServed and knowsAbout content is truncated in the diff, making it impossible to fully verify REQ-16's 20+ City entries and 8+ knowsAbout keywords. REQ-13's 'couvreur pas cher' service keyword is missing from visible meta content. Otherwise the implementation appears largely compliant.

missing_requirements.requirement: Meta description and keywords must include 'couvreur pas cher' as a service keyword
missing_requirements.reason: The visible meta description and keywords tag do not include 'couvreur pas cher' among the listed service keywords, though most other service keywords are present.

hallucinated_features.description: Additional cities beyond the required list were added to the ServiceAreas component: Enghien-les-Bains, Soisy-sous-Montmorency, Montmorency, Deuil-la-Barre, Groslay, Villiers-le-Bel, Gonesse, Ecouen, Fosses, Luzarches, Meriel, Auvers-sur-Oise, Valmondois
hallucinated_features.reason: These cities were not listed in REQ-14's required city list but were added to the cities array in ServiceAreas.tsx.

hallucinated_features.description: A service keywords tag cloud section was added inside the ServiceAreas component displaying roofing service terms as visual tags
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-14 only requested a Zones d'intervention section listing cities. A separate visual service keywords cloud was not requested in any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Added geo meta tags (geo.region, geo.placename, geo.position, ICBM) and Twitter Card meta tags
hallucinated_features.reason: None of the requirements requested geo meta tags or Twitter Card tags. Only og:title and og:description updates were requested under REQ-13.
